items.title: Tibetan Monk, Once Detained By China, Disappears Amid Crackdown Accusations
items.summary: Jamyang was previously detained on allegations of maintaining contact with Tibetans living in exile.

items.title: We can’t become second-grade citizens in India due to Centre’s policies: Revanth Reddy
items.summary: In a conversation at the two-day The Hindu Huddle in Bengaluru, the Chief Minister said southern states would not accept an imbalance in political power distribution.
